name: Whole Wheat and Popcorn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Place all ingredients into the bread machine pan according to the manufacturer's directions.
3. If your bread machine has a whole wheat setting, select it for optimal results.
4. Start the kneading cycle and allow the machine to complete the baking cycle.
5. Invert the finished loaf onto a wire rack to cool completely before slicing.
